title: Eval task fixture
description: Schema for tests/eval/tasks/*.yml. Each task defines a stimulus prompt, a mistake detector, a pass criterion, and the rule under test. Validated by tests/test_eval_schemas.py.

mistake_class.description: Short snake_case classifier for the mistake (e.g. 'returning_promise_as_value').

rule_under_test.description: The action directive being measured. Verbatim text spliced into the system prompt when rule_state=with_rule.

prompt.description: The user-message body presented to the model. Identical for with_rule and without_rule cells.

tier.description: Pass/fail criterion tier per the methodology contract: 1 = deterministic regex / regex_negative, 2 = AST + structural check, 3 = model-judge fallback (requires judge_rubric).

judge_rubric.description: Required only for tier 3. The rubric text the judge model receives alongside the response. Pinned by task_yml_sha256.

judge_calibration.description: Optional path (relative to repo root) to a calibration JSONL for tier 3 tasks. Each row is {response_text, expected_verdict}.

pattern.description: Regex pattern (Python re syntax) when type=regex or regex_negative.

forbidden_in_response.description: For type=regex_negative: substrings whose ABSENCE in the response indicates the mistake.

references.description: Sub-skill paths the rule_under_test should land in. Format: skills/<name>/SKILL.md (with optional trailing '# ERR-YYYY-NNN' comment).

notes.description: Free-text design notes for human reviewers.
